title: Stop perfecting your prompt. Do this instead
summary: Jeff Su argues practitioners should prioritize context engineering over prompt wording, and emphasizes the importance of grounding, RAG, and providing AI systems with reference documents for accuracy. The core argument is that assembling proper context and sources matters more than perfecting prompt language.
